channel.title: Summary Rules on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Summary Rules on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Summary rules in Log Analytics workspace now support manual “Retry bin”
item.description:
Log Analytics workspace summary rules now support a manual “Retry bin” action in generally available release. This lets you rerun failed bins to fill gaps in summarized data.

  • Source: Azure Updates
